name: squeez
install_doc: README: `cargo install squeez` then `squeez setup` (auto-registers hooks + memory file for detected hosts). `squeez setup` runs per-run inside the sandboxed HOME, exactly as documented.
notes: Hook-based output compressor (bash wrap, signature-mode reads, session memory, persona block prepended to the global CLAUDE.md at session start). Its binary writes to $HOME/.claude unconditionally — the per-run HOME sandbox is what makes it safe AND lets its memory file actually reach the session. `squeez setup` needs a working python3 to patch settings.json (on pyenv machines export PYENV_VERSION).
